groceries.note: home cooking; Czech supermarkets good value

diningOut.note: central Prague tourist premium; local pubs cheaper

coworking.note: hot-desk monthly €160–€200; many options in Prague 1/2

simData.note: Czech SIM; T-Mobile or O2; unlimited data plans

misc.note: gym, toiletries, entertainment, Czech beer budget, buffer

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. CEE capital peaks May–Sep.

evidence.quote: One-bedroom apartments: €800-€1,200 a month. A digital nomad with coliving and coworking spends around $1,883 per month
Coworking space membership costs between €160 and €200 per month, with some spaces offering unlimited monthly access 24/7 for $183 USD
For the typical digital nomad budget, housing absorbs about 43% ($810) and food about 36% ($676)

evidence.claim: outside centre 1BR avg ~$630; inside centre avg $1,260
evidence.quote: A one-bedroom in the city center averages $1,260/month, while the same apartment outside the center costs about $630
